items.title: Breeze adds 2 new Sun Belt destinations in 17-route expansion
items.description: David Neeleman's latest airline, Breeze Airways, will add two new destinations in a 17-route growth spurt this summer.

items.title: Spirit Airlines hopes to emerge from bankruptcy by summer
items.description: Spirit Airlines hopes to emerge from bankruptcy by late spring or early summer after reaching a deal with its creditors, the company said.

items.title: Are you eligible for the Citi / AAdvantage Globe's welcome bonus?
items.description: You don't want to miss out on a credit card's welcome offer. Here's how you can know if you're eligible for the AAdvantage Globe's welcome bonus.

items.title: From Costa Rica to Paris, these are the points hotels to book for your spring vacation
items.description: Spring is a great time to travel thanks to nice weather, beautiful flowers in bloom and some incredible hotels worthy of the trip alone.

items.title: Deal of the day: Fly to Iceland for only 17,000 JetBlue TrueBlue points
items.description: Ready for some outdoor adventure? This JetBlue deal can help you fly nonstop to Iceland for less.
